selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 球, 舞会, 球状物；v. 捏成球形
words.definition: n. round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 版本, 版, 翻版
words.definition: n. the form in which a text (especially a printed book) is published

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 角落, 转角, 窘境；vt. 迫至一隅, 垄断, 使陷入绝境
words.definition: n. a place off to the side of an area

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲
words.definition: n. an artistic form of auditory communication incorporating instrumental or vocal tones in a structured and continuous manner

words.translation: a. 书面的, 写成文字的；write的过去分词
words.definition: a. set down in writing in any of various ways

words.translation: n. 怀疑, 疑惑；v. 怀疑, 不信
words.definition: n. the state of being unsure of something

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: prep. 在...之中
words.definition: prep. Alt. of Amongst

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 世纪, 百年
words.definition: n. a period of 100 years

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 纸, 文件, 文章, 报纸, 证券, 证件；vt. 用纸糊, 贴壁纸于, 用纸包装
words.definition: n. a material made of cellulose pulp derived mainly from wood or rags or certain grasses

words.translation: n. 现在, 礼品, 瞄准；a. 现在的, 出席的
words.definition: n. the period of time that is happening now; any continuous stretch of time including the moment of speech

words.translation: n. 价格, 代价, 价值；vt. 定...的价格
words.definition: n. the amount of money needed to purchase something

words.translation: n. 先生, 阁下
words.definition: n. term of address for a man

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: r. in contact with each other or in proximity

words.translation: n. 作家, 作家的著作, 创始人
a. 最初的, 原始的, 有创意的；n. 原物, 原作
words.definition: s. preceding all others in time or being as first made or performed

words.translation: n. 教堂, 礼拜, 教会；vt. 使人接受宗教仪式
words.definition: n. one of the groups of Christians who have their own beliefs and forms of worship

words.translation: n. 哈里斯（英国苏格兰一地区）；哈里斯（姓氏）
words.definition: n. United States author who wrote the stories about Uncle Remus (1848-1908)

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇
words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 密切地
n. 次序, 规则, 命令；vi. 命令, 定货
words.definition: n. (often plural) a command given by a superior (e.g., a military or law enforcement officer) that must be obeyed

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: vi. 出现, 显得, 来到
words.definition: v. come into sight or view

words.translation: v. 相信
words.definition: v. accept as true; take to be true

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 兴趣, 嗜好, 利息, 利益, 爱好, 趣味, 势力；vt. 使感兴趣, 与...有关系
words.definition: n. a sense of concern with and curiosity about someone or something

words.translation: n. 介绍, 传入, 采用, 初步
words.definition: n. the act of beginning something new

words.translation: a. 迟的, 晚的, 已故的；adv. 很晚, 很迟, 晚
words.definition: a. being or occurring at an advanced period of time or after a usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 目录, 名单, 明细表, 布条, 条纹, 列表, 序列, 数据清单；vt. 列出, 列于表上, 记入名单内, 装布条
words.definition: n. a database containing an ordered array of items (names or topics)

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的
words.definition: n. an intermediate part or section

words.translation: adv. 大概, 或许
words.definition: r. with considerable certainty; without much doubt

words.translation: n. 公众, 民众；a. 公众的, 公共的, 公立的, 公用的
words.definition: n. a body of people sharing some common interest

words.translation: n. 出售, 卖, 拍卖, 销售额, 廉价出售
words.definition: n. a particular instance of selling

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: vi. 说, 说话, 演说, 发言；vt. 说, 讲, 说出
words.definition: v. use language

words.translation: n. 步骤, 步, 步幅, 脚步声, 踏级, 步伐, 短距离, 步态, 手段, 等级；vt. 踏, 以步测量, 跨步, 使成阶梯状
words.definition: n. the act of changing location by raising the foot and setting it down

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 西方, 西部；a. 西方的, 向西的
words.definition: n. the countries of (originally) Europe and (now including) North America and South America

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的
words.definition: n. all of something including all its component elements or parts

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
n. 结束, 完结；a. 靠近的, 亲近的, 亲密的, 严密的, 关闭的, 狭窄的, 秘密的
n. 文本, 正文, 课文, 主题, 圣经文句, 乐谱
words.definition: n. the words of something written

words.translation: n. 收集, 采集, (一批)收藏品, 募捐
words.definition: n. several things grouped together or considered as a whole

words.translation: n. 串联, 序列, 连续, 系列, 丛书, 套, 级数, 组
words.definition: n. similar things placed in order or happening one after another

words.translation: a. 不同的, 各种的, 多方面的, 许多的, 个别的, 杂色的
n. 地球, 泥土, 世界, 尘世；vt. 埋入土中, 赶入洞内
words.definition: n. the 3rd planet from the sun; the planet we live on

words.translation: n. 傍晚, 晚间, 末期
words.definition: n. the latter part of the day (the period of decreasing daylight from late afternoon until nightfall)

words.translation: a. 出名的, 极好的
n. 领域, 田地, 场地, 战场, 场, 域；vt. 使...晒在场上, 使上场
words.definition: n. a piece of land cleared of trees and usually enclosed

words.translation: adv. 刚刚, 几乎不, 勉强是
words.definition: r. almost not

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
words.definition: n. a brief written record

words.translation: n. 休息, 睡眠, 安息, 稍息, 静止, 支架, 休息处, 其余者, 剩余部分；vi. 休息, 睡, 长眠, 安心, 静止, 停止, 安置, 依赖
words.definition: n. freedom from activity (work or strain or responsibility)

words.translation: n. 桌子, 餐桌, 工作台, 铭文, 表格, 表, 高原, 平地层；vt. 搁置, 嵌合, 制表, 把...列入议事日程
words.definition: n. a set of data arranged in rows and columns

words.translation: n. 码, 庭院, 工场
words.definition: n. a unit of length equal to 3 feet; defined as 91.44 centimeters; originally taken to be the average length of a stride

words.translation: adv. 以后, 随后
words.definition: r. comparative of the adverb `late'

words.translation: n. 年龄, 老年, 成年, 寿命, 时代, 时期；v. 变老, 成熟
words.definition: n. how long something has existed

words.translation: pron. 任何事
words.definition: n. Any object, act, state, event, or fact whatever; thing of

words.translation: a. 可利用的, 可获得的, 有效的
words.definition: a. obtainable or accessible and ready for use or service

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 兄弟
words.definition: n. a male with the same parents as someone else

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 生意, 事情, 业务, 商业, 商行, 职责
words.definition: n. a commercial or industrial enterprise and the people who constitute it

words.translation: a. 清楚的, 明确的, 澄清的；adv. 清晰地
n. 女儿；a. 女儿的
words.definition: n. a female human offspring

words.translation: n. 努力, 成就
words.definition: n. use of physical or mental energy; hard work

words.translation: n. 充足, 够, 很多；a. 充足的, 足够
words.definition: n. an adequate quantity; a quantity that is large enough to achieve a purpose

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者
words.definition: n. a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

words.translation: n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: n. 历史, 过去, 经历, 发展过程, 历史学, 过去的事, 历史记录
words.definition: n. the aggregate of past events

words.translation: n. 主意, 办法, 理想, 思想, 概念, 意见
words.definition: n. the content of cognition; the main thing you are thinking about

words.translation: vt. 学习；认识到；得知
words.definition: v. gain knowledge or skills

words.translation: n. 列, 线, 绳, 电线, 线路, 路线, 航线, 作业线, 界线, 战线, 外形, 排, 家系；vt. 排成一行, 顺...排列, 划线于, 加衬里, 使有线条, 使起皱纹
words.definition: n. a formation of people or things one beside another

words.translation: n. 给予(物), 出价, 提议, 意图, 报价；vt. 提供, 出价, 奉献, 试图, 使出现, 演出
words.definition: n. the verbal act of offering

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 页, 记录, 事件, 专栏, 男侍；vt. 标明...的页数, 翻...的书页, 分页排版, 呼叫, 侍候
words.definition: n. one side of one leaf (of a book or magazine or newspaper or letter etc.) or the written or pictorial matter it contains

words.translation: n. 过去, 昔时, 往事, 早年经历, 过去时；a. 过去的, 结束的, 卸任的, 过去时的
words.definition: n. the time that has elapsed

words.translation: a. 快的, 迅速的, 敏捷的, 灵敏的, 急速的；adv. 快
words.definition: s. accomplished rapidly and without delay

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: v. 读, 阅读, 理解；a. 有学问的
words.definition: v. interpret something that is written or printed

words.translation: a. 最近的, 近代的, 最新的
words.definition: s. new

words.translation: n. 回来, 返回, 来回票, 归还, 报答, 利润率, 报告书；a. 返回的, 回程的, 报答的, 反向的, 重现的, 复原的
words.definition: n. a coming to or returning home

words.translation: n. 季节, 时节, 当令期, 时期；vt. 给...调味, 使成熟, 使老练, 缓和
words.definition: n. a period of the year marked by special events or activities in some field

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: n. 姐妹, 姐, 妹, 护士, 修女；vt. 姐妹般对待
words.definition: n. a female person who has the same parents as another person

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前
words.definition: prep. To; unto; towards; -- used of material objects.

words.translation: n. 拜访, 访问, 游览, 视察；vt. 拜访, 访问, 参观, 视察, 降临
words.definition: n. the act of going to see some person or place or thing for a short time

words.translation: a. 好奇的, 求知的, 古怪的
words.definition: s. beyond or deviating from the usual or expected

words.translation: a. 熟悉的, 常见的, 亲密的；n. 熟友, 常客
words.definition: a. well known or easily recognized

words.translation: n. 蒙蔽物, 窗帘；a. 盲目的, 瞎的, 不加思考的
words.definition: n. people who have severe visual impairments, considered as a group

words.translation: n. 叶, 树叶, 花瓣, 页；vi. 生叶, 翻书页
words.definition: n. the main organ of photosynthesis and transpiration in higher plants

words.translation: n. 图书馆, 藏书, 库
words.definition: n. a room where books are kept

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 诗, 诗般美的事物
words.definition: n. a composition written in metrical feet forming rhythmical lines

words.translation: a. 聪明的, 漂亮的, 刺痛的, 剧烈的, 敏捷的, 巧妙的, 伶俐的, 潇洒的；n. 刺痛, 痛苦
words.definition: a. showing mental alertness and calculation and resourcefulness

words.translation: n. 前进, 进展, 行过的路程；vi. 前进, 进展, 提高, 上涨
words.definition: n. an amount paid before it is earned

words.translation: n. 橱柜, 内阁；a. 内阁的, 细木工做的
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture resembling a cupboard with doors and shelves and drawers; for storage or display

words.translation: num. 五, 五个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of four and one

words.translation: n. 册, 卷, 体积, 容量, 大量, 许多, 份量, 音量；vi. 成团卷起
words.definition: n. the amount of 3-dimensional space occupied by an object

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 副本, 摹仿, 一册；v. 复印, 抄袭, 复制
words.definition: n. a thing made to be similar or identical to another thing

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: vt. 发现, 找到, 暴露；vi. 发现
words.definition: v. make a discovery, make a new finding

words.translation: adv. 尤其, 特别, 格外
n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: n. 手指, 指状物, (手套的)手指部分, 指针；v. 用手指拨弄, 伸出
words.definition: n. any of the terminal members of the hand (sometimes excepting the thumb)

words.translation: n. 玻璃, 玻璃杯, 透镜；vt. 装玻璃于, 反射, 反映
words.definition: n. a brittle transparent solid with irregular atomic structure

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的

words.translation: adv. 直接地, 立刻, 立即
words.definition: r. without delay or hesitation; with no time intervening

words.translation: n. 一月
words.definition: n. the first month of the year; begins 10 days after the winter solstice

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 腿, 假腿, 路程；vi. 走, 跑
words.definition: n. a human limb; commonly used to refer to a whole limb but technically only the part of the limb between the knee and ankle

words.translation: n. 杂志, 仓库, 弹盒, 胶卷盒
words.definition: n. a periodic publication containing pictures and stories and articles of interest to those who purchase it or subscribe to it

words.translation: n. 记忆, 记忆力, 回忆, 纪念, 存储；n. 内存
words.definition: n. something that is remembered

words.translation: n. 博物馆
words.definition: n. a depository for collecting and displaying objects having scientific or historical or artistic value

words.translation: a. 必要的；必然的；必需的
words.definition: a. absolutely essential

words.translation: n. 注意, 布告, 通知, 预告, 短评；vt. 注意, 通知, 评论, 提及, 关注
words.definition: n. an announcement containing information about an event

words.translation: n. 十一月
words.definition: n. the month following October and preceding December

words.translation: n. 时期, 节段, 节, 句点, 学时, 周期；a. 当时特有的, 过去某段时期的
words.definition: n. the interval taken to complete one cycle of a regularly repeating phenomenon

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
